key_events: A bounty hunt scenario is initiated, with constellations from Channel HBIT-36Me placing a 2,000-coin bounty on Kim Dok-Ja's head, with a 10-minute time limit.

Lee Hyeon-Sung, now fully awakened with his characteristic 'The Man Who Recovered His Sense of Justice' and Stigma 'Great Mountain Destruction LVL.1', pledges to protect Dok-Ja, though his powerful new skill can only be used twice.
Kim Dok-Ja reveals his strategy, inspired by Yu Joong-Hyuk's actions in 'Ways of Survival', to destroy all Green Zones in Chungmuro Station.
The destruction of all Green Zones overloads the channel and triggers a 'Main Scenario #3: Emergency Defense', requiring all incarnations to survive a massive monster attack for 8 hours.

Dok-Ja uses his 'Marker' skill and 'Incite LVL.2' on Cheon In-Ho to provoke Gong Pil-Du, explaining that the Green Zones were the true trap of the scenario and that collective fighting is the only way to survive.

Convinced by Dok-Ja's manipulation and the pleas of the crowd, Gong Pil-Du activates his 'Private Property LVL.3' and 'Militarized Zone LVL.4' to fight the incoming monsters, buying time for his trap.
The bounty on Kim Dok-Ja's head expires and is removed.
Dok-Ja reveals he had Yoo Sang-Ah, Jung Hee-Won, and Lee Gil-Yung destroy smaller Green Zones, and enlisted Lee Ji-Hae (Yu Joong-Hyuk's disciple) to handle larger ones.

Several constellations, including the 'Prisoner of the Golden Headband', 'Bald Leader of the Army of If and Villagers', and 'Abyssal Black Flame Dragon', react positively to Dok-Ja's chaotic actions, sponsoring him with coins, while Dokkaebis express fury.
summary.character_updates: Kim Dok-Ja continues to demonstrate exceptional strategic foresight and manipulative prowess, successfully turning Gong Pil-Du into a reluctant ally and orchestrating the destruction of all Green Zones to trigger a more manageable scenario. Lee Hyeon-Sung's character summary is updated, confirming his awakened characteristic and new stigma, and he displays unwavering loyalty to Dok-Ja. Gong Pil-Du, initially an antagonist, is effectively incited by Dok-Ja to join the fight against the monsters. Yoo Sang-Ah, Jung Hee-Won, and Lee Gil-Yung are confirmed to have executed Dok-Ja's orders to destroy Green Zones. Lee Ji-Hae is introduced as a new character, a disciple of Yu Joong-Hyuk and the 'Incarnation of the Sacred Hero', who also assisted Dok-Ja.
summary.lore_and_worldbuilding: The concept of 'Bounty Hunt' alternative scenarios is introduced, where constellations can place bounties on incarnations. Green Zones are revealed to be a strategic trap within scenarios, designed to isolate incarnations and prevent collective action. Their destruction can trigger a 'Scenario Renewal' and an 'Emergency Defense' main scenario. The influence of Dokkaebi channels and the varied reactions of constellations to unconventional actions are further explored, with some constellations delighting in chaos and sponsoring Dok-Ja.
summary.ending_cliffhanger: As the group prepares to face the monster onslaught, a new 'Bounty Hunt Scenario' is announced, with a voice exclaiming, 'It's here! Get her!', indicating a new target or threat, possibly a female character, is now being hunted, adding immediate and unexpected danger to the already chaotic situation.
